spec_match.rationale: The viewer now models the Chrome 130 rule across publisher cookies, advertiser cookies, and same-web versus cross-app/web context.

interactive.rationale: Publisher, advertiser, context, and per-key controls all update the pre-130 and Chrome 130 report panels, privacy chip, and leakage explanation.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The lede now promises the three-axis report diff and explains that Chrome 130 strips debug keys for one-sided cookie access or cross-app/web reports.

edge_cases.rationale: All four cookie-state combinations remain reachable, and the cross-app/web branch is now visible with both keys stripped in Chrome 130.

references.rationale: The see-also section now includes the ChromeStatus entry for feature 6257907243679744 and the Attribution Reporting debugging spec.

design_system.rationale: The privacy chips now use contrast-safe foreground/background pairs from the design variables rather than matching text and background colors.

summary: Report Diff Viewer now has readable privacy chips, the required references, and a cross-app/web context branch so the side-by-side report diff covers the full debug-key stripping rule.
